THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: (JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO TERMS OF CONSENT JUDGMENT) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF ANTHONY HELD PH.D. P.E'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND [PROPOSED] CONSENT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. AFTER REVIEWING THE PAPERS, THE COURT HAS DETERMINED THAT THE REFORMULATION AND WARNING PROVISION ARE COMPLIANT WITH THE CODE. THE FEES AND PENALTY PROVISIONS ARE REASONABLE. ORDER AND JUDGMENT WERE SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: TAMRA KEEN CSR # 5404
